columns.name: game_id
columns.comment: Unique identifier for the game, linking all related plays to a specific match.

columns.name: play_id
columns.comment: Unique identifier for each specific play within a game, crucial for play tracking and analysis.

columns.name: old_game_id
columns.comment: Represents the previous game identifier if the current game was played with an updated identifier.

columns.name: home_team
columns.comment: Name of the team designated as the home team for the game, important for determining venue effects.

columns.name: away_team
columns.comment: Name of the team designated as the away team for the game, which can affect fan support and team performance.

columns.name: season_type
columns.comment: Indicates the type of season, such as regular season or playoffs, providing context for the game's significance.

columns.name: week
columns.comment: Number indicating the week of the season during which the game is played, helpful for understanding season progression.

columns.name: posteam
columns.comment: The team that is currently on offense during the play, essential for analyzing team performance.

columns.name: posteam_type
columns.comment: Indicates whether the offense team is the home or away team, providing additional context for analysis.

columns.name: defteam
columns.comment: The team that is currently on defense for the play, important for defensive strategy analysis.

columns.name: side_of_field
columns.comment: Specifies which side of the field the play is occurring on, aiding in field position evaluations.

columns.name: yardline_100
columns.comment: The distance in yards from the opponent's end zone, indicating where the play begins on the field.

columns.name: game_date
columns.comment: The date on which the game took place, useful for historical context and timelines.

columns.name: quarter_seconds_remaining
columns.comment: The number of seconds left in the current quarter of the game, critical for late-game strategies.

columns.name: half_seconds_remaining
columns.comment: The total seconds remaining in the current half of the game, providing context for strategies based on time.

columns.name: game_seconds_remaining
columns.comment: Remaining seconds in the game, vital for understanding time management during critical plays.

columns.name: game_half
columns.comment: Indicates whether the current status of the game is in the first or second half, useful for strategy adjustments.

columns.name: quarter_end
columns.comment: Time point at which the quarter ends, useful for play statistics and evaluations.

columns.name: drive
columns.comment: Identifies the current drive number within the game, important for tracking offensive series.

columns.name: sp
columns.comment: Special play indicator to denote specific types of plays that may not follow standard rules.

columns.name: qtr
columns.comment: Number of the current quarter in which the play is occurring, essential for contextualizing statistics.

columns.name: down
columns.comment: Indicates the current down during a play, crucial for understanding play strategies and possibilities.

columns.name: goal_to_go
columns.comment: Indicates whether the offense has a goal to go situation, which affects play decision-making.

columns.name: time
columns.comment: Represents the game clock time at which the play occurred, useful for matching plays to specific moments.

columns.name: yrdln
columns.comment: Yard line indicating where the play starts, important for field position assessments.

columns.name: ydstogo
columns.comment: The number of yards the offensive team needs to gain for a first down, crucial for play-calling.

columns.name: ydsnet
columns.comment: The net yards gained on the play, providing direct insight into the effectiveness of the play run.

columns.name: desc
columns.comment: Description of the play, offering narrative context for understanding the play's significance and execution.

columns.name: play_type
columns.comment: Categorizes the type of play being run, useful for statistical analysis and comparison.

columns.name: yards_gained
columns.comment: Number of yards gained as a direct result of the play, essential for player and team evaluation.

columns.name: shotgun
columns.comment: Indicates whether the play was run from a shotgun formation, relevant for analyzing offensive strategies.

columns.name: no_huddle
columns.comment: Indicator of whether the offense ran a no-huddle play, important for pacing and strategy analysis.

columns.name: qb_dropback
columns.comment: Indicates whether the quarterback dropped back during the play, relevant for pass attempts.

columns.name: qb_kneel
columns.comment: Indicates if the quarterback performed a kneel play, often used to run out the clock.

columns.name: qb_spike
columns.comment: Indicates if the quarterback spiked the ball to stop the clock, commonly used in late-game scenarios.

columns.name: qb_scramble
columns.comment: Indicates whether the quarterback scrambled out of the pocket, highlighting mobile quarterback dynamics.

columns.name: pass_length
columns.comment: Describes the length of the pass play, important for evaluating quarterback performance.

columns.name: pass_location
columns.comment: Specifies where the pass was aimed, helping to assess receiver effectiveness and defensive coverage.

columns.name: air_yards
columns.comment: Measures the distance the ball traveled in the air before reaching the receiver, relevant for evaluating passing effectiveness.

columns.name: yards_after_catch
columns.comment: Represents the yards gained by the receiver after making a catch, crucial for assessing offensive capabilities.

columns.name: run_location
columns.comment: Describes the location on the field where a running play took place, important for understanding offensive diversity.

columns.name: run_gap
columns.comment: Indicates the gap the running back targeted during the play, useful for analyzing rushing strategies.

columns.name: field_goal_result
columns.comment: Describes the outcome of field goal attempts, significant for special teams analysis.

columns.name: kick_distance
columns.comment: The distance of a kick attempt, giving insight into the difficulty and success rate of field goals.

columns.name: extra_point_result
columns.comment: Describes the success or failure of the extra point attempt following a touchdown, important for scoring analysis.

columns.name: two_point_conv_result
columns.comment: Indicates the outcome of a two-point conversion attempt, critical for evaluating scoring strategies.

columns.name: home_timeouts_remaining
columns.comment: Number of timeouts left for the home team, relevant for strategic late-game decisions.

columns.name: away_timeouts_remaining
columns.comment: Number of timeouts left for the away team, useful for analyzing strategic options.

columns.name: timeout
columns.comment: Indicates whether a timeout was called during the play, important for understanding game tempo.

columns.name: timeout_team
columns.comment: Names the team that called the timeout, relevant for strategic analysis and game flow.

columns.name: td_team
columns.comment: Indicates which team scored the touchdown during the play.

columns.name: td_player_name
columns.comment: The name of the player who scored the touchdown.

columns.name: td_player_id
columns.comment: A unique identifier for the player who made the touchdown.

columns.name: posteam_timeouts_remaining
columns.comment: Shows the number of timeouts remaining for the offensive team at this point in the game.

columns.name: defteam_timeouts_remaining
columns.comment: Indicates the number of timeouts remaining for the defensive team.

columns.name: total_home_score
columns.comment: Represents the cumulative score for the home team throughout the game up to this point.

columns.name: total_away_score
columns.comment: Shows the cumulative score for the away team during the game up to this point.

columns.name: posteam_score
columns.comment: The score achieved by the offensive team as a result of the play.

columns.name: defteam_score
columns.comment: The score achieved by the defensive team in relation to this play, if applicable.

columns.name: score_differential
columns.comment: Calculates the difference between the scores of the two teams, highlighting the leading team's advantage.

columns.name: posteam_score_post
columns.comment: Displays the offensive team's score after the completion of the play.

columns.name: defteam_score_post
columns.comment: Represents the defensive team's score after the play, if applicable.

columns.name: score_differential_post
columns.comment: Indicates the score differential after the play has concluded.

columns.name: no_score_prob
columns.comment: Estimates the probability that no score will occur on the current drive.

columns.name: opp_fg_prob
columns.comment: Indicates the probability that the opposing team will successfully kick a field goal.

columns.name: opp_safety_prob
columns.comment: Represents the probability that the opposing team will score a safety.

columns.name: opp_td_prob
columns.comment: Estimates the likelihood of the opposing team scoring a touchdown.

columns.name: fg_prob
columns.comment: Shows the probability of successfully making a field goal on the current drive.

columns.name: safety_prob
columns.comment: Indicates the probability of scoring a safety on this particular play.

columns.name: td_prob
columns.comment: Represents the likelihood of scoring a touchdown on this play.

columns.name: extra_point_prob
columns.comment: Estimates the probability of successfully scoring an extra point following a touchdown.

columns.name: two_point_conversion_prob
columns.comment: Indicates the probability of successfully executing a two-point conversion after a touchdown.

columns.name: ep
columns.comment: Represents the expected points from the current play based on various factors.

columns.name: epa
columns.comment: Calculates the expected points added as a result of the current play, showing its impact on scoring.

columns.name: total_home_epa
columns.comment: The total expected points added for the home team throughout the game to this point.

columns.name: total_away_epa
columns.comment: The total expected points added for the away team during the game to this point.

columns.name: total_home_rush_epa
columns.comment: Represents the expected points added from rushing plays by the home team up to this point.

columns.name: total_away_rush_epa
columns.comment: Shows the expected points added from rushing plays by the away team throughout the game.

columns.name: total_home_pass_epa
columns.comment: Indicates the expected points added from passing plays by the home team to this point.

columns.name: total_away_pass_epa
columns.comment: Represents the expected points added from passing plays by the away team throughout the game.

columns.name: air_epa
columns.comment: Calculates the expected points added from air yards on the current play.

columns.name: yac_epa
columns.comment: Represents the expected points added from yards after the catch on this particular play.

columns.name: comp_air_epa
columns.comment: Shows the expected points added from completed air yards on the current play.

columns.name: comp_yac_epa
columns.comment: Indicates the expected points added from completed yards after the catch on this play.

columns.name: total_home_comp_air_epa
columns.comment: The total expected points added from completed air yards for the home team throughout the game.

columns.name: total_away_comp_air_epa
columns.comment: The total expected points added from completed air yards for the away team during the game.

columns.name: total_home_comp_yac_epa
columns.comment: Indicates the total expected points added from completed yards after the catch for the home team.

columns.name: total_away_comp_yac_epa
columns.comment: Represents the total expected points added from completed yards after the catch for the away team.

columns.name: total_home_raw_air_epa
columns.comment: Shows the raw expected points added from all air yards for the home team throughout the game.

columns.name: total_away_raw_air_epa
columns.comment: Indicates the raw expected points added from all air yards for the away team during the game.

columns.name: total_home_raw_yac_epa
columns.comment: Represents the raw expected points added from all yards after the catch for the home team.

columns.name: total_away_raw_yac_epa
columns.comment: Indicates the raw expected points added from all yards after the catch for the away team.

columns.name: wp
columns.comment: Calculates the win probability for the offensive team at the current moment in the game.

columns.name: def_wp
columns.comment: Shows the win probability for the defensive team at this point of the game.

columns.name: home_wp
columns.comment: Indicates the win probability for the home team based on the current game context.

columns.name: away_wp
columns.comment: Represents the win probability for the away team based on the current situation in the game.

columns.name: wpa
columns.comment: Calculates the change in win probability as a result of the current play.

columns.name: vegas_wpa
columns.comment: Shows the Vegas line-based win probability added from the play, considering betting odds.

columns.name: vegas_home_wpa
columns.comment: Indicates the Vegas line-based win probability specific to the home team following the play.

columns.name: home_wp_post
columns.comment: Represents the updated win probability for the home team after the play has concluded.

columns.name: away_wp_post
columns.comment: Represents the win probability for the away team after the current play has been executed.

columns.name: vegas_wp
columns.comment: Indicates the win probability estimated by Las Vegas odds for the current point in the game.

columns.name: vegas_home_wp
columns.comment: Shows the win probability for the home team based on Las Vegas betting lines at this moment in the game.

columns.name: total_home_rush_wpa
columns.comment: Calculates the total win probability added by all rushing plays made by the home team throughout the game.

columns.name: total_away_rush_wpa
columns.comment: Measures the total win probability contributed by the away team's rushing plays throughout the course of the game.

columns.name: total_home_pass_wpa
columns.comment: Reflects the total win probability gained from passing plays executed by the home team during the game.

columns.name: total_away_pass_wpa
columns.comment: Summarizes the total win probability generated by passing plays performed by the away team in the game.

columns.name: air_wpa
columns.comment: Represents the win probability added from air yards gained on passing plays during the game.

columns.name: yac_wpa
columns.comment: Quantifies the win probability gained from yards after catch on completed passes during the game.

columns.name: comp_air_wpa
columns.comment: Tracks the win probability contributed by completed passes that resulted in air yards.

columns.name: comp_yac_wpa
columns.comment: Measures the win probability yielded from completed passes that resulted in yards after the catch.

columns.name: total_home_comp_air_wpa
columns.comment: Calculates the total win probability from all completed passes that resulted in air yards for the home team.

columns.name: total_away_comp_air_wpa
columns.comment: Tracks the total win probability from all completed passes that resulted in air yards for the away team.

columns.name: total_home_comp_yac_wpa
columns.comment: Summarizes the total win probability from completed passes for the home team that resulted in yards after catch.

columns.name: total_away_comp_yac_wpa
columns.comment: Measures the total win probability from completed passes for the away team that resulted in yards after catch.

columns.name: total_home_raw_air_wpa
columns.comment: Reflects the total win probability based purely on raw air yardage for all passes completed by the home team.

columns.name: total_away_raw_air_wpa
columns.comment: Indicates the total win probability based on raw air yardage from all completed passes by the away team.

columns.name: total_home_raw_yac_wpa
columns.comment: Calculates the total win probability based on raw yards after catch from all completed passes by the home team.

columns.name: total_away_raw_yac_wpa
columns.comment: Measures the total win probability from raw yards after catch from all completed passes by the away team.

columns.name: punt_blocked
columns.comment: Counts the number of punts that were blocked during the game.

columns.name: first_down_rush
columns.comment: Records the total number of first downs gained by rushing attempts.

columns.name: first_down_pass
columns.comment: Logs the total number of first downs gained by passing attempts.

columns.name: first_down_penalty
columns.comment: Tracks the total number of first downs awarded via penalties.

columns.name: third_down_converted
columns.comment: Records the number of times the team converted third down attempts into first downs.

columns.name: third_down_failed
columns.comment: Counts the instances where the team failed to convert a third down attempt.

columns.name: fourth_down_converted
columns.comment: Measures the number of successful conversions on fourth down attempts.

columns.name: fourth_down_failed
columns.comment: Records the instances where the team was unable to convert a fourth down attempt.

columns.name: incomplete_pass
columns.comment: Counts the total number of passing attempts that were not completed.

columns.name: touchback
columns.comment: Records the number of touchbacks that occurred during the game.

columns.name: interception
columns.comment: Tracks the number of interceptions thrown by the offense during the game.

columns.name: punt_inside_twenty
columns.comment: Counts the number of punts that were downed inside the opponent's 20-yard line.

columns.name: punt_in_endzone
columns.comment: Measures the number of punts that were kicked into the end zone.

columns.name: punt_out_of_bounds
columns.comment: Records the number of times a punt went out of bounds.

columns.name: punt_downed
columns.comment: Tracks the number of punts that were downed by the kicking team without a return.

columns.name: punt_fair_catch
columns.comment: Counts the total number of fair catches called by the receiving team on punts.

columns.name: kickoff_inside_twenty
columns.comment: Measures the number of kickoffs that were downed inside the opponent's 20-yard line.

columns.name: kickoff_in_endzone
columns.comment: Records the number of kickoffs that reached the end zone.

columns.name: kickoff_out_of_bounds
columns.comment: Tracks the number of kickoffs that went out of bounds.

columns.name: kickoff_downed
columns.comment: Counts the total number of kickoffs that were downed by the kicking team.

columns.name: kickoff_fair_catch
columns.comment: Records the number of fair catches made by the receiving team on kickoffs.

columns.name: fumble_forced
columns.comment: Counts the number of fumbles that were forced by the defense.

columns.name: fumble_not_forced
columns.comment: Records the number of fumbles that occurred without being forced by the defense.

columns.name: fumble_out_of_bounds
columns.comment: Tracks the number of fumbles that went out of bounds.

columns.name: solo_tackle
columns.comment: Measures the number of solo tackles made by defensive players during the game.

columns.name: safety
columns.comment: Indicates the number of safeties scored during the game.

columns.name: penalty
columns.comment: Tracks the total number of penalties called during the game.

columns.name: tackled_for_loss
columns.comment: Counts the number of plays where a ball carrier was tackled for a loss of yards.

columns.name: fumble_lost
columns.comment: Records the number of fumbles that resulted in a change of possession.

columns.name: own_kickoff_recovery
columns.comment: Counts the number of times the kicking team recovered their own kickoff.

columns.name: own_kickoff_recovery_td
columns.comment: Measures the number of touchdowns scored following a recovery of the kicking team's own kickoff.

columns.name: qb_hit
columns.comment: Indicates the number of times the quarterback was hit during a play, reflecting pressure on the passer.

columns.name: rush_attempt
columns.comment: Counts the total attempts made by the offense to run the ball during a play.

columns.name: pass_attempt
columns.comment: Represents the total number of attempts made by the offense to pass the ball.

columns.name: sack
columns.comment: Identifies the number of times the quarterback was sacked, resulting in a loss of yardage.

columns.name: touchdown
columns.comment: Tracks the total touchdowns scored by the team on a given play.

columns.name: pass_touchdown
columns.comment: Details the number of touchdowns that were scored specifically via passing plays.

columns.name: rush_touchdown
columns.comment: Indicates the number of touchdowns that were scored as a result of rushing plays.

columns.name: return_touchdown
columns.comment: Records the total number of touchdowns scored by return actions, such as kick or punt returns.

columns.name: extra_point_attempt
columns.comment: Represents the total number of attempts made to score an extra point following a touchdown.

columns.name: two_point_attempt
columns.comment: Counts the number of attempts for a two-point conversion following a touchdown.

columns.name: field_goal_attempt
columns.comment: Tracks the number of attempts made to score a field goal during the game.

columns.name: kickoff_attempt
columns.comment: Indicates each instance of a kickoff in the game, representing teams' attempts to start plays.

columns.name: punt_attempt
columns.comment: Records the total number of attempts made to execute a punt during the game.

columns.name: fumble
columns.comment: Indicates the number of fumbles that occurred during plays, whether by the offense or defense.

columns.name: complete_pass
columns.comment: Tracks the total number of successful passing completions made by the quarterback.

columns.name: assist_tackle
columns.comment: Counts the number of tackles where a player assisted in bringing down the ball carrier.

columns.name: lateral_reception
columns.comment: Records instances of receptions made on lateral passes, which can affect offensive strategies.

columns.name: lateral_rush
columns.comment: Indicates the number of rush attempts made via lateral plays during the game.

columns.name: lateral_return
columns.comment: Represents the returns that were initiated by lateral passes, providing insight into play execution.

columns.name: lateral_recovery
columns.comment: Tracks the number of times a player recovered the ball after a lateral play.

columns.name: passer_player_id
columns.comment: Unique identifier for the player who made the pass during a play.

columns.name: passer_player_name
columns.comment: Displays the name of the player who executed the pass.

columns.name: passing_yards
columns.comment: Indicates the total yards gained by passing plays during a specific instance.

columns.name: receiver_player_id
columns.comment: Unique identifier for the player who caught the pass during a play.

columns.name: receiver_player_name
columns.comment: Shows the name of the player who received the pass.

columns.name: receiving_yards
columns.comment: Tracks the total yards gained by the receiving player on a play.

columns.name: rusher_player_id
columns.comment: Unique identifier for the player who carried the ball during a rushing play.

columns.name: rusher_player_name
columns.comment: Displays the name of the player responsible for the rushing attempt.

columns.name: rushing_yards
columns.comment: Indicates the total yards gained during rushing plays.

columns.name: lateral_receiver_player_id
columns.comment: Unique identifier for the player who received a lateral pass during a play.

columns.name: lateral_receiver_player_name
columns.comment: Shows the name of the player who executed the lateral pass reception.

columns.name: lateral_receiving_yards
columns.comment: Tracks the total yards gained by the player receiving a lateral pass.

columns.name: lateral_rusher_player_id
columns.comment: Unique identifier for the player who rushed after a lateral pass.

columns.name: lateral_rusher_player_name
columns.comment: Displays the name of the player who rushed following a lateral play.

columns.name: lateral_rushing_yards
columns.comment: Indicates the total yards gained from lateral rushing attempts.

columns.name: lateral_sack_player_id
columns.comment: Identifies the player responsible for a sack occurring during a lateral play.

columns.name: lateral_sack_player_name
columns.comment: Shows the name of the player who recorded the sack in a lateral scenario.

columns.name: interception_player_id
columns.comment: Unique identifier for the player who intercepted a pass during the game.

columns.name: interception_player_name
columns.comment: Displays the name of the player who made the interception.

columns.name: lateral_interception_player_id
columns.comment: Unique identifier for the player who intercepted a lateral pass.

columns.name: lateral_interception_player_name
columns.comment: Shows the name of the player who executed the interception on a lateral play.

columns.name: punt_returner_player_id
columns.comment: Unique identifier for the player who returned a punt.

columns.name: punt_returner_player_name
columns.comment: Displays the name of the player who executed a punt return.

columns.name: lateral_punt_returner_player_id
columns.comment: Identifier for the player who returned a punt following a lateral play.

columns.name: lateral_punt_returner_player_name
columns.comment: Shows the name of the player involved in a lateral punt return.

columns.name: kickoff_returner_player_name
columns.comment: Displays the name of the player who returned a kickoff.

columns.name: kickoff_returner_player_id
columns.comment: Unique identifier for the player who executed a kickoff return.

columns.name: lateral_kickoff_returner_player_id
columns.comment: Identifier for the player who returned a kickoff after a lateral play.

columns.name: lateral_kickoff_returner_player_name
columns.comment: Shows the name of the player involved in a lateral kickoff return.

columns.name: punter_player_id
columns.comment: Unique identifier for the player who executed a punt.

columns.name: punter_player_name
columns.comment: The name of the player who is designated to punt the football during a play.

columns.name: kicker_player_name
columns.comment: The name of the player responsible for kicking field goals or extra points.

columns.name: kicker_player_id
columns.comment: A unique identifier for the player who executes kicks during the game.

columns.name: own_kickoff_recovery_player_id
columns.comment: The identifier for the player who recovers the kickoff for their own team.

columns.name: own_kickoff_recovery_player_name
columns.comment: The name of the player who successfully recovers their own team's kickoff.

columns.name: blocked_player_id
columns.comment: The identifier for the player who blocked a kick or pass during the play.

columns.name: blocked_player_name
columns.comment: The name of the player who managed to block a kick or pass attempt.

columns.name: tackle_for_loss_1_player_id
columns.comment: The identifier for the player who made the first tackle resulting in a loss of yards.

columns.name: tackle_for_loss_1_player_name
columns.comment: The name of the player who achieved the first tackle resulting in a loss for the offense.

columns.name: tackle_for_loss_2_player_id
columns.comment: The identifier for the second player involved in making a tackle that resulted in a loss.

columns.name: tackle_for_loss_2_player_name
columns.comment: The name of the second player who contributed to a tackle resulting in a loss of yards.

columns.name: qb_hit_1_player_id
columns.comment: The identifier of the player who made the first hit on the quarterback during the play.

columns.name: qb_hit_1_player_name
columns.comment: The name of the player who delivered the first hit to the quarterback.

columns.name: qb_hit_2_player_id
columns.comment: The identifier of the second player who hit the quarterback during the play.

columns.name: qb_hit_2_player_name
columns.comment: The name of the player who made the second hit on the quarterback.

columns.name: forced_fumble_player_1_team
columns.comment: The team affiliation of the player who forced a fumble on the play.

columns.name: forced_fumble_player_1_player_id
columns.comment: The identifier for the player who caused a fumble.

columns.name: forced_fumble_player_1_player_name
columns.comment: The name of the player responsible for forcing a fumble.

columns.name: forced_fumble_player_2_team
columns.comment: The team affiliation of the second player who contributed to the forced fumble.

columns.name: forced_fumble_player_2_player_id
columns.comment: The identifier for the second player involved in forcing a fumble.

columns.name: forced_fumble_player_2_player_name
columns.comment: The name of the second player who contributed to the forced fumble.

columns.name: solo_tackle_1_team
columns.comment: The team that the player who made the first solo tackle belongs to.

columns.name: solo_tackle_2_team
columns.comment: The team that the player who made the second solo tackle belongs to.

columns.name: solo_tackle_1_player_id
columns.comment: The identifier for the player who made the first solo tackle.

columns.name: solo_tackle_2_player_id
columns.comment: The identifier for the player who made the second solo tackle.

columns.name: solo_tackle_1_player_name
columns.comment: The name of the player who performed the first solo tackle.

columns.name: solo_tackle_2_player_name
columns.comment: The name of the player who executed the second solo tackle.

columns.name: assist_tackle_1_player_id
columns.comment: The identifier of the player who assisted in the first tackle.

columns.name: assist_tackle_1_player_name
columns.comment: The name of the player who contributed to the first tackle made with assistance.

columns.name: assist_tackle_1_team
columns.comment: The team affiliation of the player who assisted in the first tackle.

columns.name: assist_tackle_2_player_id
columns.comment: The identifier for the second player who provided assistance on a tackle.

columns.name: assist_tackle_2_player_name
columns.comment: The name of the second player who assisted in a tackle.

columns.name: assist_tackle_2_team
columns.comment: The team affiliation of the player who assisted in the second tackle.

columns.name: assist_tackle_3_player_id
columns.comment: The identifier for the third player involved in assisting on a tackle.

columns.name: assist_tackle_3_player_name
columns.comment: The name of the third player who provided assistance on a tackle.

columns.name: assist_tackle_3_team
columns.comment: The team affiliation for the player who assisted in the third tackle.

columns.name: assist_tackle_4_player_id
columns.comment: The identifier for the fourth player who contributed to an assist on a tackle.

columns.name: assist_tackle_4_player_name
columns.comment: The name of the fourth player who assisted in making a tackle.

columns.name: assist_tackle_4_team
columns.comment: The team affiliation of the player who assisted in the fourth tackle.

columns.name: tackle_with_assist
columns.comment: The total number of tackles made that included assists from other players.

columns.name: tackle_with_assist_1_player_id
columns.comment: The identifier of the player involved in the first tackle with assistance.

columns.name: tackle_with_assist_1_player_name
columns.comment: The name of the first player who was part of a tackle with assistance.

columns.name: tackle_with_assist_1_team
columns.comment: The team affiliation of the player involved in the first assisted tackle.

columns.name: tackle_with_assist_2_player_id
columns.comment: The identifier of the second player involved in a tackle with assistance.

columns.name: tackle_with_assist_2_player_name
columns.comment: The name of the second player who participated in a tackle with assistance.

columns.name: tackle_with_assist_2_team
columns.comment: The team affiliation of the second player involved in an assisted tackle.

columns.name: pass_defense_1_player_id
columns.comment: The identifier for the player who made the first pass defense attempt.

columns.name: pass_defense_1_player_name
columns.comment: The name of the player who successfully defended against a pass.

columns.name: pass_defense_2_player_id
columns.comment: The identifier for the player who made the second pass defense attempt.

columns.name: pass_defense_2_player_name
columns.comment: The name of the player who contributed to the second pass defense.

columns.name: fumbled_1_team
columns.comment: The team that is responsible for the first fumble occurring during the play.

columns.name: fumbled_1_player_id
columns.comment: Unique identifier for the player who fumbled the ball first.

columns.name: fumbled_1_player_name
columns.comment: Name of the player who committed the first fumble.

columns.name: fumbled_2_player_id
columns.comment: Unique identifier for the player involved in the second fumble, if applicable.

columns.name: fumbled_2_player_name
columns.comment: Name of the player who committed the second fumble during the play.

columns.name: fumbled_2_team
columns.comment: The team associated with the player related to the second fumble, if it occurred.

columns.name: fumble_recovery_1_team
columns.comment: The team that recovered the first fumble.

columns.name: fumble_recovery_1_yards
columns.comment: The yardage gained by the team on the recovery of the first fumble.

columns.name: fumble_recovery_1_player_id
columns.comment: Unique identifier for the player who recovered the first fumble.

columns.name: fumble_recovery_1_player_name
columns.comment: Name of the player who successfully recovered the first fumble.

columns.name: fumble_recovery_2_team
columns.comment: The team that recovered the second fumble, if applicable.

columns.name: fumble_recovery_2_yards
columns.comment: The yardage gained by the team on the recovery of the second fumble.

columns.name: fumble_recovery_2_player_id
columns.comment: Unique identifier for the player who recovered the second fumble, if applicable.

columns.name: fumble_recovery_2_player_name
columns.comment: Name of the player who successfully recovered the second fumble, if it occurred.

columns.name: sack_player_id
columns.comment: Unique identifier for the player who recorded the sack.

columns.name: sack_player_name
columns.comment: Name of the player who made the sack on the quarterback.

columns.name: half_sack_1_player_id
columns.comment: Unique identifier for the first player credited with a half sack.

columns.name: half_sack_1_player_name
columns.comment: Name of the first player credited with a half sack.

columns.name: half_sack_2_player_id
columns.comment: Unique identifier for the second player credited with a half sack.

columns.name: half_sack_2_player_name
columns.comment: Name of the second player credited with a half sack.

columns.name: return_team
columns.comment: The team that has possession of the ball during a return play.

columns.name: return_yards
columns.comment: The number of yards gained on the return play.

columns.name: penalty_team
columns.comment: The team that committed a penalty during the play.

columns.name: penalty_player_id
columns.comment: Unique identifier for the player who was flagged for the penalty.

columns.name: penalty_player_name
columns.comment: Name of the player who committed the penalty.

columns.name: penalty_yards
columns.comment: The number of yards assessed as a penalty against the penalized team.

columns.name: replay_or_challenge
columns.comment: Indicates whether the play was subject to a replay review or challenge.

columns.name: replay_or_challenge_result
columns.comment: Outcome of the replay review or challenge, indicating if it was upheld or reversed.

columns.name: penalty_type
columns.comment: Describes the type of penalty that occurred during the play.

columns.name: defensive_two_point_attempt
columns.comment: Indicates whether the defense attempted a two-point conversion after a touchdown.

columns.name: defensive_two_point_conv
columns.comment: Indicates successful conversion or failure on the defensive two-point attempt.

columns.name: defensive_extra_point_attempt
columns.comment: Indicates whether the defense attempted to prevent an extra point following a touchdown.

columns.name: defensive_extra_point_conv
columns.comment: Indicates whether the defense succeeded in stopping the extra point attempt.

columns.name: safety_player_name
columns.comment: Name of the player who scored a safety, if applicable.

columns.name: safety_player_id
columns.comment: Unique identifier for the player who scored a safety.

columns.name: season
columns.comment: Represents the NFL season associated with the plays recorded in this table.

columns.name: cp
columns.comment: Completion percentage during the specified play or sequence.

columns.name: cpoe
columns.comment: Completion percentage over expected, indicating efficiency relative to expectations.

columns.name: series
columns.comment: Indicates the series number during the game, tracking offensive sequences.

columns.name: series_success
columns.comment: Marks whether the series ended successfully or not, based on the outcome.

columns.name: series_result
columns.comment: Describes the overall result of the play series, such as a touchdown or turn over.

columns.name: order_sequence
columns.comment: The sequence number of the play within the game.

columns.name: start_time
columns.comment: The timestamp indicating when the play started.

columns.name: time_of_day
columns.comment: The time of day when the play took place.

columns.name: stadium
columns.comment: The stadium where the game is being played.

columns.name: weather
columns.comment: Describes the weather conditions during the game.

columns.name: nfl_api_id
columns.comment: Unique identifier used for API references related to NFL plays.

columns.name: play_clock
columns.comment: The remaining time on the play clock before the snap.

columns.name: play_deleted
columns.comment: Indicates whether the play has been flagged as deleted for any reason.

columns.name: play_type_nfl
columns.comment: The specific type of play occurring, as classified by the NFL.

columns.name: special_teams_play
columns.comment: Indicates whether the play is a special teams play, which includes kickoffs, punts, and field goals.

columns.name: st_play_type
columns.comment: Represents the type of special teams play executed during the game.

columns.name: end_clock_time
columns.comment: Details the remaining clock time when the play ended, usually formatted in game time.

columns.name: end_yard_line
columns.comment: Shows the yard line where the play concluded, indicating the position on the field.

columns.name: fixed_drive
columns.comment: Identifies the fixed drive number associated with a series of plays leading to a drive result.

columns.name: fixed_drive_result
columns.comment: Describes the outcome of the fixed drive, such as whether a touchdown, field goal, or turnover occurred.

columns.name: drive_real_start_time
columns.comment: Records the actual time when the drive commenced, providing context to the timing of plays.

columns.name: drive_play_count
columns.comment: Counts the total number of plays that occurred during the drive.

columns.name: drive_time_of_possession
columns.comment: Indicates the total duration the offensive team possessed the ball during the drive.

columns.name: drive_first_downs
columns.comment: Quantifies the number of first downs achieved during the drive, reflecting its effectiveness.

columns.name: drive_inside20
columns.comment: Denotes whether the drive reached inside the opponent's 20-yard line, which is often critical for scoring.

columns.name: drive_ended_with_score
columns.comment: Marks whether the drive concluded with a scoring play.

columns.name: drive_quarter_start
columns.comment: Indicates the quarter in which the drive began, helping to analyze performance by phase.

columns.name: drive_quarter_end
columns.comment: Identifies the quarter when the drive concluded, useful for end-of-game analysis.

columns.name: drive_yards_penalized
columns.comment: Reflects the total yards lost to penalties during the course of the drive.

columns.name: drive_start_transition
columns.comment: Describes the transition events at the start of the drive, such as kickoffs or turnovers.

columns.name: drive_end_transition
columns.comment: Details the transition events at the end of the drive, for example, the scoring play or turnover.

columns.name: drive_game_clock_start
columns.comment: Notes the game clock time when the drive began, allowing for analysis of late-game situations.

columns.name: drive_game_clock_end
columns.comment: Records the game clock time when the drive ended, providing context to the duration of drive.

columns.name: drive_start_yard_line
columns.comment: Identifies the yard line where the drive started, crucial for understanding field position strategy.

columns.name: drive_end_yard_line
columns.comment: Indicates the yard line where the drive finished, which can affect overall game statistics.

columns.name: drive_play_id_started
columns.comment: Represents the play ID associated with the start of the drive, linking it to the play-by-play data.

columns.name: drive_play_id_ended
columns.comment: Records the play ID corresponding to the end of the drive, aiding in tracking play sequences.

columns.name: away_score
columns.comment: Shows the score for the away team at the time of the drive, critical for understanding game dynamics.

columns.name: home_score
columns.comment: Displays the score for the home team during the drive, which helps evaluate performance impact.

columns.name: location
columns.comment: Describes the location where the game is played, essential for context regarding home field advantage.

columns.name: result
columns.comment: Categorizes the result of the drive, such as a score or turnover, impacting further game analysis.

columns.name: total
columns.comment: Indicates the cumulative score across both teams, reflecting their combined performance.

columns.name: spread_line
columns.comment: Represents the betting line established for the game, indicating expectations prior to the matchup.

columns.name: total_line
columns.comment: Shows the total points projected for the game, which helps in analyzing overall game outcomes.

columns.name: div_game
columns.comment: Indicates whether the game is a division matchup, which often carries added significance in standings.

columns.name: roof
columns.comment: Describes the roofing conditions of the stadium, providing insight into game day factors.

columns.name: surface
columns.comment: Identifies the playing surface type, such as turf or grass, which can affect gameplay.

columns.name: temp
columns.comment: Records the temperature at the game, influencing player performance and game strategy.

columns.name: wind
columns.comment: Captures wind conditions during the game, which can have a major impact on passing and kicking.

columns.name: home_coach
columns.comment: Names the head coach of the home team, important for understanding coaching strategies.

columns.name: away_coach
columns.comment: Identifies the head coach of the away team, providing context to the opposing strategies.

columns.name: stadium_id
columns.comment: Links to the unique identifier for the stadium where the game took place.

columns.name: game_stadium
columns.comment: Specifies the name of the stadium, crucial for identifying the location of the game.

columns.name: aborted_play
columns.comment: Indicates whether a play was aborted, highlighting irregularities in game execution.

columns.name: success
columns.comment: Denotes the success rate of the play, useful for analyzing efficiency and effectiveness.

columns.name: passer
columns.comment: Names the player who threw the pass during the play, key for analysis of quarterback performance.

columns.name: passer_jersey_number
columns.comment: Records the jersey number of the passer, aiding in player identification during plays.

columns.name: rusher
columns.comment: Names the player who carried the ball on a rushing play, important for evaluating rushing strategies.

columns.name: rusher_jersey_number
columns.comment: Captures the jersey number of the rusher, which is essential for quick identification.

columns.name: receiver
columns.comment: Identifies the player who received a pass during the play, critical for evaluating receiving stats.

columns.name: receiver_jersey_number
columns.comment: Records the jersey number of the receiver, facilitating player recognition.

columns.name: pass
columns.comment: Quantifies the effectiveness of passing plays during the drive.

columns.name: rush
columns.comment: Reflects the effectiveness of rushing plays performed in the drive.

columns.name: first_down
columns.comment: Indicates the number of first downs achieved, showcasing the drive's success in moving the chains.

columns.name: special
columns.comment: Indicates any special circumstances or situations pertaining to the play being logged, impacting its classification.

columns.name: play
columns.comment: Represents the unique identifier for the specific play within the context of the game.

columns.name: passer_id
columns.comment: Identifies the player who is responsible for throwing the pass during the play.

columns.name: rusher_id
columns.comment: Identifies the player who is carrying the ball during a rushing play.

columns.name: receiver_id
columns.comment: Identifies the player intended to receive the pass from the passer in the play.

columns.name: name
columns.comment: The name of the play being executed, providing a descriptive context to the action taken.

columns.name: jersey_number
columns.comment: Represents the jersey number of the player involved in the play, aiding in player identification.

columns.name: id
columns.comment: A unique identifier for each entry in the play-by-play log, ensuring distinct tracking of events.

columns.name: fantasy_player_name
columns.comment: The name of the player as recognized in fantasy football contexts, relevant for fantasy sports analysis.

columns.name: fantasy_player_id
columns.comment: A unique identifier associated with the player for fantasy football purposes.

columns.name: fantasy
columns.comment: Categorization or description of the player's fantasy impact or classification based on the play.

columns.name: fantasy_id
columns.comment: A specific identifier linked to the player's fantasy status, useful for tracking performance in fantasy leagues.

columns.name: out_of_bounds
columns.comment: Indicates whether the play resulted in the player being out of bounds, impacting the outcome and statistics recorded.

columns.name: home_opening_kickoff
columns.comment: Signifies whether the given play is the opening kickoff for the home team, which may have specific implications.

columns.name: qb_epa
columns.comment: Evaluates the expected points added by the quarterback on the play, contributing to overall performance metrics.

columns.name: xyac_epa
columns.comment: Assesses the expected points added based on yards after catch (YAC) metrics, crucial for analyzing play effectiveness.

columns.name: xyac_mean_yardage
columns.comment: Calculates the average yardage gained from yards after catch for players involved in the play.

columns.name: xyac_median_yardage
columns.comment: Provides the median yardage gained from yards after catch, offering insight into typical performance levels.

columns.name: xyac_success
columns.comment: Measures whether the play was considered successful based on yards after catch metrics.

columns.name: xyac_fd
columns.comment: Indicates first downs achieved as a result of the yards after catch, critical for assessing play outcomes.

columns.name: xpass
columns.comment: Evaluates the effectiveness and distance of the pass thrown during the play, contributing to overall passing statistics.

columns.name: pass_oe
columns.comment: Denotes whether the pass was considered on target or with optimal execution, relevant for quarterback assessments.

columns.name: game_type
columns.comment: Classifies the type of game being played, providing context such as regular season, playoffs, or other classifications.

columns.name: ingested_at
columns.comment: Records the timestamp indicating when the data was added to the system, useful for data tracking and auditing.

columns.name: _source_file
columns.comment: Identifies the source file from which the data was ingested, providing traceability and context for data origin.
